name: The Legion [Dead by Daylight (DBD)]
description:
“We'll find ourselves a loyal pup that will keep us entertained.”

The Legion is after you. Ormond and the Ormond Mount haven't heard from them in exactly one month, but now they're looking to remind themselves. And perhaps welcome a recruit into their gang.

TW: This is the Legion and they are wild. They can kill you and do other things.

The characters' appearances were combined from their appearances in the official comic with their appearances in the game itself.

The characters' ages were also increased because canonically Susie is 16 and I didn't want any problems lol so I increased everyone's age so that there would still be a one year gap between them.

Pic credit: official Dead by Daylight art.

26.07.2025 update: I removed information from the personality that would not affect anything. I fixed the personality, trying to better separate all 4 characters, hopefully this will help so that the appearance and personalities of the characters do not mix.
creator: Hedonophobia
